legend: placeable = renders + has a schema (safe to emit). verdict/v2Status/uses/notes are the manifest's live advice — prefer high-`uses`, read `notes`. If a row has `supersededBy`, emit THAT block instead (a current replacement exists). A 'merged' row with no `supersededBy` is still the only placeable option — keep using it. Never emit anything in `deprecated` or `notPlaceableTypes`.

placeable.title: Hero (legacy)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Hero V2 (layout: imageRight | centered). Awaiting migration script to flip _type + add layout enum on existing docs.

placeable.title: Cards
placeable.notes: Consolidated cards block. Variants: default · outlined · tile · expandable · kinetic · showcase · bento · proof. `showHeader` toggle on the block hides the section header lockup so the cards can stack flush under another block.

placeable.title: Media Cards (legacy)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Cards (default/outlined/tile). Migration: rename _type=cards, set variant=default.

placeable.title: Hero 2 — image right (legacy)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Hero V2 layout=imageRight. Migration: set _type=hero, layout=imageRight.

placeable.title: Feature + Media
placeable.notes: Workhorse split layout. Code block or image on either side.

placeable.title: Logos — marquee
placeable.notes: Reference-fragment block. Dual-row marquee with pill cells.

placeable.title: Feature + Testimonial
placeable.notes: Flattened quoteCardItem onto the block. Image placeholder + heading + body + coral-rule quote tile + CTA. Two layouts (image right / left).

placeable.title: Form
placeable.notes: Aurora reskin of the v1 form-block. Three layouts: split (copy + features + form), standalone (form only, centred), with-asset (asset preview + form for gated landing pages). Gating itself lives in HubSpot / thank-you pages, not in-block.

placeable.title: Rich Text Content
placeable.notes: Prose host. Geist type scale per brand book: Light at display, Regular at h1–h2, Medium at h3. Coral pull-quote rule for the one brand emphasis per page.

placeable.title: Logos (deprecated)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Logos · marquee (LogosMarqueeV2). Migration: convert inline logos into a referenced logosBlock fragment and flip _type.

placeable.title: Accordion + Image
placeable.notes: Visual covered by the Stepper — hover/focus to activate, per-step preview (image / chat / placeholder), inline body expansion. Migration: rename _type to steppedShowcase, map each accordion item's title+body+image into a step's title/body/preview.

placeable.title: CTA (deprecated)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Hero V2 (layout=centered). Migration: rename _type=hero, set layout=centered.

placeable.title: Case Studies (block)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Case Study Showcase variants (arches · pills · rounded · interactive). Schema unchanged — just pick the variant via the existing `variant` enum on the block.

placeable.title: Stats
placeable.notes: Counter motion · coral emphasis · verified pill.

placeable.title: Callout Cards (legacy)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Cards (variant=outlined). Migration: rename _type=cards, set variant=outlined.

placeable.title: Industry Cards (legacy)
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Cards (variant=tile). Migration: rename _type=cards, set variant.

placeable.title: Video Testimonial Hero
placeable.notes: Hero-scale customer testimonial paired with a vertical video tile. Quote + coral stat anchor on one side, video player on the other. Position swap supported.

placeable.title: Feature Columns
placeable.notes: Flat N-column block. No card chrome — just icon + eyebrow + heading + body, gap-px hairlines between columns, all sitting on the same baseline.

placeable.title: Features Layout
placeable.notes: Aurora reskin of the v1 features block. Same functionality: sticky tab bar with circled-number pills, per-block scroll-progress bars, click-to-scroll, auto-active on scroll. Composite group container preserved; each nested block renders an image + text content stack.

placeable.title: Stepper
placeable.notes: Absorbs steppedShowcase + accordionImage. Hover/focus to activate a step, body expands inline, sticky preview panel swaps. Per-step preview can be placeholder, image, or interactive chat. Auto-advances every 4s with a coral timer bar; hovering the step list pauses.

placeable.title: Comparison Quiz
placeable.notes: Interactive 2-3 question quiz that biases an outcome. Each option contributes to an outcome key; after all questions the matching outcome is shown with CTA. Reset button.

placeable.title: Hero (animated visual) — legacy
placeable.notes: Visual covered by Hero V2 (with the chat-animation code block when visualType lands). Migration: set _type=hero.

placeable.title: Hero + Industry Showcase
placeable.notes: Industry-picker hero with video + scripted chat. Two layouts: default + arch.

placeable.title: Immersive Mini-Site
placeable.notes: Scroll-driven expanding panels.

placeable.title: Video Block
placeable.notes: Shared video primitive — Mux/URL/YouTube routed via the `source` prop. Optional eyebrow + title + caption around the player. 16:9, rounded-24, play-pill overlay.

placeable.title: Inline Video
placeable.notes: Same primitive as Video Block, used for URL-sourced clips embedded inline in prose. Minimal chrome.

placeable.title: Webinar · Registration
placeable.notes: Combined digital-event sign-up module: co-brand eyebrow + title + subtitle, date/time/format facts, a 'What you'll learn' list, speaker cards (name · role · LinkedIn) and a sticky HubSpot registration form. For online webinars — pairs with the Webinar page template.

placeable.title: Event · Details
placeable.notes: Agenda + speakers + venue panel.

placeable.title: Event · Multi-date list
placeable.notes: Multi-date / multi-location module for field-marketer tours.

placeable.title: Asset · Preview (gated landing)
placeable.notes: Pairs with form-block on the gated-asset landing template.

placeable.title: Asset · Delivery (thank-you page)
placeable.notes: Thank-you page after gated download.

deprecated.title: Section Opener
deprecated.notes: Killed in v2. Every block now carries its own mandatory eyebrow + heading + body, so a standalone opener is redundant. Migration: fold each existing Section Opener's content into the next block's intro fields, then delete.

registryOnly.note: Renders but not catalogued in the manifest yet — confirm it's intended for new pages before using.
